sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Northrim's Proposed Merger Would Bring 11 Oregon Branches
feed.summary: Northrim BanCorp (NASDAQ: NRIM) has agreed to acquire PBCO Financial in an all-stock merger valued at approximately $167.3 million, or $32.36 per PBCO share. This acquisition will mark Northrim's first out-of-state expansion, adding 11 branches in Southern Oregon and the Willamette Valley. The combined entity is projected to have about $4.2 billion in assets, $3.0 billion in loans, and $3.5 billion in deposits, with the deal expected to close in Q4 2026 or early Q1 2027.

feed.title: OptimizeRx appoints Sarah Bast as chief marketing officer By Investing.com
feed.summary: OptimizeRx Corp. (NASDAQ:OPRX) announced the appointment of Sarah Bast as Chief Marketing Officer. Bast brings over 20 years of pharmaceutical marketing experience, having previously served as Executive Vice President at Publicis Health Media and guided marketing strategy for major life sciences companies. In her new role, she will lead OptimizeRx's marketing strategy, brand positioning, and go-to-market initiatives, focusing on strengthening relationships with healthcare marketing agencies and life sciences teams.

feed.title: T-Mobile US (TMUS) Q2 2026 earnings summary
feed.summary: T-Mobile US (TMUS) reported a strong Q2 2026 with total revenues up 8% year-over-year to $22.8 billion and net income of $3.2 billion. The company highlighted significant acquisitions, including UScellular's wireless business, and achieved a record-high wireless NPS score. T-Mobile also raised its 2026 guidance for Core Adjusted EBITDA and Adjusted Free Cash Flow, projecting continued growth and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Does Your ETF Portfolio Reflect Your Goals? A Look at the SPDR Global Stock Market ETF vs. the Climate Paris Aligned ETF.
feed.summary: This article compares two ETFs from State Street: the SPDR Global Stock Market ETF (SPGM) and the Climate Paris Aligned ETF (NZAC). SPGM offers broad, low-cost global equity exposure with nearly 3,000 holdings, while NZAC provides specialized, ESG-screened global exposure focused on climate transition risks and opportunities with fewer holdings. Investors choose between these based on whether they prioritize maximum diversification and lower costs (SPGM) or a climate-conscious investment strategy (NZAC).

feed.title: Thermo Fisher stock rebounds after Q2 beat (TMO:NYSE)
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) saw its stock rebound by approximately 5% in premarket trading after reporting better-than-expected Q2 2026 results. This comes after a recent decline influenced by a peer's lower outlook. The life sciences company is based in Waltham, Massachusetts.

feed.title: BMO Announces Cash Distributions for Certain BMO ETFs and ETF Series of BMO Mutual Funds for July 2026
feed.summary: BMO Asset Management Inc. and BMO Investments Inc. have announced the July 2026 cash distributions for unitholders of BMO ETFs and ETF Series of BMO Mutual Funds. Unitholders of record by July 30, 2026, will receive distributions payable on August 5, 2026. The announcement includes a detailed table listing the per unit cash distribution amount for various funds.

feed.title: Saudi PIF's $55 billion EA deal approved under EU merger rules
feed.summary: A group of investors led by Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF) has received EU antitrust approval for its $55 billion acquisition of Electronic Arts. The European Commission found no competition concerns, though it is still scrutinizing the deal under its Foreign Subsidies Regulation (FSR), with a decision expected by July 30. This acquisition, also involving Jared Kushner's Affinity Partners and Silver Lake, is noted as the largest leveraged buyout in history.

feed.title: Applied Materials to Report Fiscal Third Quarter 2026 Results on Aug. 13, 2026
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (Nasdaq: AMAT) announced it will hold its fiscal third quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, Aug. 13, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET / 1:30 p.m. PT. The call will be webcast live on its investor relations website, with a replay available later that day. Applied Materials is a leader in materials engineering solutions for semiconductor and advanced display manufacturing.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Fall in Premarket Trading; Medpace Holdings, Allegion Lead
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures are falling in premarket trading. Medpace Holdings Inc. (MEDP) is up 17.4%, and Allegion PLC (ALLE) is up 14.8% ahead of the U.S. stock market open.

feed.title: Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) Updates Q3 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Honeywell International (NASDAQ:HON) has updated its Q3 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS of $2.05-$2.20 and revenue of $4.9 billion-$5.0 billion, which are both below Wall Street's consensus estimates. Despite this cautious outlook for the near future, the company reported a strong Q2, with EPS of $4.52 and revenue of $9.72 billion significantly exceeding expectations. Analysts have a mixed view on HON, with an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $257.79.

feed.title: Clark Atlanta University Establishes Endowed Sustainability Professorship with $500,000 Southern Company Grant
feed.summary: Clark Atlanta University has established an endowed professorship in sustainability, thanks to a $500,000 matching grant from the Southern Company Foundation. This initiative is part of the Historically Black Colleges and Universities Sustainable Communities Initiative (HBCU SCI) and aims to support a faculty member focused on environmental politics, urban planning, and sustainable communities. The endowment will allow the university to recruit a distinguished scholar, enhance academic offerings, and prepare students to address pressing environmental and social challenges.

feed.title: Sarah Bast Brings More Than Two Decades of Pharma Marketing to OptimizeRx
feed.summary: OptimizeRx (Nasdaq: OPRX) has appointed Sarah Bast as its new Chief Marketing Officer, effective July 23, 2026. Bast brings over two decades of experience in pharmaceutical marketing, specializing in point of care media strategy, analytics, and optimization. In her new role, she will lead OptimizeRx's marketing strategy, brand positioning, and go-to-market initiatives, aiming to strengthen relationships within the healthcare industry and support product innovation.

feed.title: Fastenal (FAST) Stock Could Be Fully Priced Following Strong Q2 Results
feed.summary: Fastenal (FAST) stock has delivered an 88.3% return over five years, but recent valuation checks suggest it may be fully priced. Trading at a P/E of 38.5x, well above industry averages and its fair P/E estimate of 29.8x, the stock appears overvalued despite strong Q2 2026 results. This valuation signals that much of the optimism for Fastenal's future growth and investments is already reflected in its current share price, leading to a tighter margin for error for investors.

feed.title: Graham Board of Adjustment won't waive ordinance to allow Dollar Tree sign larger than city allows
feed.summary: The Graham Board of Adjustment unanimously denied Dollar Tree's request for a sign 40% larger than the city's ordinance allows for its new store at 811 South Main Street. Board members found the presentation by Dollar Tree's representatives lacking in factual evidence, relying too much on opinion rather than specific data to justify the variance. The decision upholds the city's existing signage standards, despite arguments for increased visibility and customer safety.

feed.title: Westpac Banking Corp Trims Position in Xcel Energy Inc. $XEL
feed.summary: Westpac Banking Corp significantly reduced its stake in Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:XEL) by 60.8% in the first quarter, selling 26,918 shares and retaining 17,374 shares worth approximately $1.38 million. Despite this, Wall Street analysts largely maintain a positive outlook on XEL, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $92.65, comfortably above its current trading price of around $80.19. Xcel Energy reported in-line quarterly earnings of $0.91 per share on revenues of $4.02 billion and continues to pay a quarterly dividend, offering a 3.0% annual yield.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group Upgrades United Dominion Realty Trust (NYSE:UDR) to Strong-Buy
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has upgraded United Dominion Realty Trust (NYSE:UDR) to a "strong-buy" rating, despite a mixed reception from other analysts and the company missing its recent quarterly EPS estimates. UDR, a real estate investment trust specializing in multifamily apartment communities, also announced a 25 million-share buyback program and reaffirmed its FY 2026 guidance. The stock currently has an average "Hold" rating with an average price target of $41.50 across all analysts.

feed.title: Blackstone Q2 earnings beat as strong inflows boost AUM (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) reported Q2 earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, driven by substantial inflows of nearly $70 billion, which significantly boosted assets under management and subsequently increased management and advisory fees. The company's investment strategies showed strong performance, with infrastructure leading with a 7.2% return, followed by its Absolute Return multi-asset strategy at 5.8%. All major segments of Blackstone's operations experienced positive returns during the quarter.

feed.title: Cigna says AI tools to save customers $200 million in medical expenses over three years
feed.summary: Health insurer Cigna announced that its new AI tools are projected to save customers $200 million in medical costs over the next three years. These tools will identify patients with chronic or complex conditions earlier, connect them to clinicians, and boost clinical access by 20%. The company expects earlier detection of cancers and an annual saving of $2,000 for customers using these clinical programs.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares posts decline in Q2 margin on funding costs, 2026 outlook maintained (HBAN:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) reported a modest decline in its second-quarter margin due to increased funding costs. Despite this, the bank's revenue and earnings were in line with analyst expectations, and it maintained its full-year 2026 outlook. Following the news, HBAN shares were trading lower.

feed.title: Pool Corporation Reports Second Quarter Results; Confirms Annual Earnings Guidance Range, Excluding CEO Transition Costs
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) reported its second-quarter 2026 results, showing a 2% increase in net sales to $1.8 billion, driven by resilient maintenance business and improved building materials sales. The company confirmed its annual earnings guidance range of $10.87 to $11.17 per diluted share, excluding CEO transition costs. Operating income decreased 2% to $267.7 million but increased 1% to $275.9 million when excluding the CEO transition costs.

feed.title: Form 8-K WEST PHARMACEUTICAL SERV For: Jul 23
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. filed a Form 8-K on July 23, 2026, to announce its second-quarter 2026 financial results. The report includes a press release (Exhibit 99.1) and presentation materials (Exhibit 99.2) related to these results. The company also confirmed its registration with the SEC and its trading symbol WST on the New York Stock Exchange.

feed.title: Tractor Supply lowers guidance amid weak demand for big-ticket items, pet business (TSCO:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) lowered its full-year guidance due to weak demand for big-ticket items and its pet business, resulting in a first-quarter earnings report that fell short of expectations. The company reported a 1.5% decrease in comparable store sales, primarily driven by softness in May and discretionary categories. To address underperformance, Tractor Supply plans to focus on improving its companion animal business, reinforcing value, enhancing productivity, and reallocating capital.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Energy Companies: Range Resources (RRC) and Halliburton (HAL)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided new ratings for energy companies Range Resources (RRC) and Halliburton (HAL). Gabriele Sorbara from Siebert Williams Shank & Co reiterated a Hold rating for Range Resources with a $42.00 price target, while RBC Capital's Keith Mackey maintained a Buy rating on Halliburton with a $45.00 price target. The current analyst consensus for Range Resources is Hold, and for Halliburton, it is a Strong Buy.

feed.title: Dow beats quarterly profit estimates on higher polyethylene prices, boosts savings target
feed.summary: Dow Inc. surpassed Wall Street's second-quarter adjusted profit estimates, driven by elevated polyethylene prices resulting from Middle East supply shocks and strategic cost-cutting measures. The company's packaging and specialty plastics segment saw significant sales growth, and Dow raised its savings target for the "Transform to Outperform" program, expecting an additional $200 million in benefits this year. Shares climbed 2.4% in premarket trading following the positive earnings report.

feed.title: Brown & Brown Launches AI-First Strategy With Anthropic, McKinsey and Accenture
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. is adopting an AI-first operating model, partnering with Anthropic, McKinsey & Company, and Accenture to integrate artificial intelligence across its operations. This initiative aims to enhance customer service, improve efficiency, and boost teammate productivity, with Anthropic's Claude platform being deployed to over 23,000 employees. The company's decentralized approach allows local teams to develop AI solutions, following successful internal pilot projects that showed significant productivity gains.

feed.title: Westpac Banking Corp Has $1.60 Million Stock Holdings in Vistra Corp. $VST
feed.summary: Westpac Banking Corp significantly increased its stake in Vistra Corp., acquiring an additional 8,849 shares to hold a total of 10,626 shares valued at approximately $1.6 million. This move is part of a broader trend of high institutional ownership in Vistra, with major firms like Vanguard and State Street also holding substantial positions. The article highlights Vistra's strong market performance, positive analyst ratings, and a recent earnings beat, alongside detailing recent insider trading activities including sales by a director and the CAO.

feed.title: Jacobs (J) Receives Positive Outlook from Citi Analyst
feed.summary: Citi analyst Andrew Kaplowitz has initiated a 90-day catalyst watch for Jacobs (J) with a Buy recommendation and a $181 target price, citing an expanding backlog and strong booking trends for the latter half of 2026. Jacobs, with a market capitalization of $15.41 billion and a GF Score of 73/100, offers engineering, design, and construction services. While the company shows positive insider buying activity, its current P/E ratio of 40.15x is significantly higher than its historical median, suggesting a premium valuation.

feed.title: Wetour Robotics Joins Qualcomm Partner Network to Evaluate Dragonwing Technologies for Industrial and Embedded IoT Applications
feed.summary: Wetour Robotics has joined the Qualcomm Partner Network's Industrial and Embedded IoT Track to evaluate Dragonwing technologies for its Orchestra platform, a multimodal edge AI operating system. This partnership grants Wetour access to Qualcomm's tools and resources, aiming to enhance its applications in industrial robotics and smart factory operations. However, the company notes that membership does not guarantee technology integration or successful development, with future steps dependent on technical feasibility and market needs.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Launches Private Markets Platform for Direct Stakes in SpaceX, Stripe
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has introduced a new alternative investments platform designed to offer wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in high-profile private companies like SpaceX, Stripe, and Canva before their IPOs. This platform consolidates existing alternative investments with new teams to manage direct investments and secondary market transactions. The move addresses surging client demand as companies remain private longer and aims to capture a larger share of the growing private markets industry.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (POOL) Pool Corporation Posts Q2 Adjusted EPS $5.38 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $5.33
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) reported its Q2 adjusted Earnings Per Share (EPS) of $5.38, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $5.33. The company also announced Q2 revenue of $1.82 billion, which met the FactSet estimate. This financial update provides key performance indicators for investors following the recreational products wholesale distributor.

feed.title: Martin Midstream Partners Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Declares Quarterly Cash Distribution
feed.summary: Martin Midstream Partners L.P. announced its second quarter 2026 financial results, reporting a net income of $2.6 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $27.9 million, surpassing internal expectations and the prior year's Q2 performance. Despite a net loss of $4.1 million for the first half of 2026, the Partnership maintained its full-year Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $90.0 million and declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.005 per common unit. The results were bolstered by strong performances in terminalling and storage, and specialty products, though the fertilizer division faced challenges from higher input costs.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Buying Embrace To Expand Observability Into User Experience
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) announced its plan to acquire Embrace, a provider of Digital Experience Monitoring tools, to enhance its Observability platform with Real User Monitoring and Synthetic monitoring capabilities. This strategic acquisition aims to extend PANW's reach into application performance and end-user experience management, moving beyond its core cybersecurity offerings. The move is expected to broaden the company's role from infrastructure protection to performance and reliability measurement, though it also introduces integration complexities and competition with established Observability providers.

feed.title: N-able named champion in Omdia managed backup and disaster recovery
feed.summary: N-able, Inc. (NYSE: NABL) has been recognized for the third consecutive year as a Champion in the 2026 Omdia Global Managed Backup and Disaster Recovery Leadership Matrix. Their Cove Data Protection platform, which includes integrated Disaster Recovery as a Service (DRaaS) capabilities, was highlighted for its role in helping organizations minimize downtime and recover from cyberattacks. This recognition underscores N-able's continued leadership in providing cyber resilience solutions, with the managed services market for backup and DRaaS projected to grow significantly.

feed.title: NovoCure: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: This article provides a brief "earnings snapshot" for NovoCure's Q2 performance. Due to the limited content, specific financial details are not available.

feed.title: Amazon's Bezos pushes Prime Video redesign focused on AI: Reuters
feed.summary: Jeff Bezos is reportedly pushing for a major AI-focused redesign of Amazon's Prime Video streaming service, codenamed "Lighthouse." This initiative aims to showcase Amazon's significant investments in artificial intelligence by improving recommendations, search capabilities, and overall personalization for Prime Video's more than 200 million users. The redesign stemmed from Bezos's dissatisfaction with a previous proposal that failed to sufficiently emphasize AI, highlighting the company's efforts to enhance its AI stature amidst competition.

feed.title: Mizuho initiates NeuroPace stock coverage with outperform rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has initiated coverage on NeuroPace Inc. (NASDAQ:NPCE) with an "outperform" rating and a price target of $22.00, representing a 51% upside potential from its current stock price. The rating is driven by findings from a July 2026 neurology survey indicating potential FDA label expansion for the company's Responsive Neurostimulation System for adult Idiopathic Generalized Epilepsy and market share gains in adult focal epilepsy. Despite recent revenue growth, the company remains unprofitable, though Mizuho's bull case sees a $35 target with IGE expansion.

feed.title: REGN INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Regeneron Investors of Securities Class Action Lawsuit Deadline on September 14, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of the upcoming September 14, 2026, deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN). The lawsuit alleges that Regeneron and its executives made false and misleading statements and/or failed to disclose critical information concerning the company's Phase 3 Fianlimab/Libtayo clinical study, leading to significant stock price drops. Investors who purchased REGN securities between August 1, 2023, and May 15, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Matador Resources to acquire Paloma for $1.275 billion
feed.summary: Matador Resources Company announced its definitive agreement to acquire Paloma Permian LLC for $1.275 billion in cash, adding significant acreage and reserves in New Mexico. The acquisition, expected to close in Q4 2026, includes 16,235 net undeveloped acres and 55 million barrels of oil equivalent in proved reserves. Matador also acquired Woodford play acreage from Ridge Runner Resources II, LLC, bringing its total Delaware Basin acreage to approximately 240,000 net acres, with funding from cash on hand and its credit facility.

feed.title: Avery Dennison declares $1.00 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) announced its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.00 per share. The dividend is payable on September 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 2, 2026. Avery Dennison is a materials science and digital identification solutions company with recent sales of $8.9 billion in 2025 and approximately 35,000 employees globally.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS Shares Acquired by Sei Investments Co.
feed.summary: Sei Investments Co. increased its stake in The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. by 19.4% in the first quarter, acquiring an additional 31,244 shares. The Goldman Sachs Group recently reported stronger-than-expected Q2 earnings, with EPS of $20.98 and revenue of $20.34 billion, and increased its quarterly dividend to $5.00 per share. Despite positive news and strong financial performance, analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: N-able Adds Disaster Recovery to Help Businesses Recover Faster
feed.summary: N-able, Inc. (NYSE: NABL) has been recognized as a Champion in the 2026 Omdia Global Managed Backup and Disaster Recovery (BDR) Leadership Matrix for the third consecutive year. This recognition highlights N-able's Cove Data Protection, which now includes integrated Disaster Recovery as a Service (DRaaS) capabilities. The company aims to help businesses with faster, simpler recovery from cyberattacks and outages, addressing the growing importance of cyber recovery and business continuity.

feed.title: The Two Divergent Futures Priced Into Caterpillar Stock
feed.summary: The article titled "The Two Divergent Futures Priced Into Caterpillar Stock" from Trefis appears to be a stub or a placeholder. It provides a title hinting at an analysis of Caterpillar's stock valuation based on different future scenarios but lacks any actual content beyond navigation and boilerplate text. The piece mentions financial market data sources and disclaimers about interactive models.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Cuts Price Target on TE Connectivity to $209 From $230, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for TE Connectivity (TEL) to $209 from $230, while maintaining an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for TE Connectivity, with firms like Baird, HSBC, Goldman Sachs, and Jefferies also making changes to their price targets for the company around the same time. The news follows TE Connectivity's recent earnings report and announcement of its plan to acquire Astrodyne Corporation for $1.4 billion.

feed.title: (ROP) Roper Technologies, Inc. Expects Q3 Adjusted DEPS Range $5.75 - $5.80
feed.summary: Roper Technologies, Inc. (ROP) expects its Q3 Adjusted DEPS to be in the range of $5.75 - $5.80. The company also announced its 2026 Adjusted DEPS forecast of $22.15 - $22.30, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $21.91. Furthermore, Roper Technologies reported Q2 revenue of $2.11 billion and adjusted DEPS of $5.38 per share, both exceeding FactSet's estimates.

feed.title: Eastman's Kingsport site granted temporary exemption from EPA air pollution rules
feed.summary: Eastman's Kingsport site has been granted a temporary exemption from EPA air pollution rules. This decision allows the facility to operate with less stringent environmental regulations for a specified period. The details surrounding the reasons for the exemption and its potential impact are not provided in this snippet.

feed.title: AMTX Q2'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 67.69M USD
feed.summary: Aemetis, Inc (AMTX) is scheduled to announce its Q2'26 earnings on July 30. The company anticipates a revenue of 67.69 million USD and an EPS of (0.26) USD for the quarter. This article provides a historical overview of reported and estimated revenues and EPS for previous quarters.

feed.title: BNGO Q2'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 7.48M USD
feed.summary: Bionano Genomics, Inc. (BNGO) is scheduled to release its Q2'26 earnings on July 30, with an estimated revenue of $7.48 million and an anticipated EPS of ($0.69). The article provides a historical overview of reported and estimated revenue and EPS figures for previous quarters, along with surprise percentages.

feed.title: DAIO Q2'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 5.20M USD
feed.summary: Data I/O Corporation (DAIO) is scheduled to announce its Q2'26 financial results on July 30, after market close. The company anticipates revenue of $5.20 million and an EPS of -$0.04 for the quarter. This article provides a brief overview of past and projected revenue and EPS figures.

feed.title: Blackstone’s Profit Surges on AI Investments
feed.summary: Blackstone's profits have seen a significant surge in the second quarter, primarily driven by its strategic investments in the artificial intelligence sector. This growth is evident across all of the firm's major business units, including private-equity, private-credit, and real estate, demonstrating the widespread impact of AI on the investment giant's financial performance. Stronger inflows into its private-equity business helped to offset a slowdown in private-credit due to individual investors pulling back.

feed.title: NNBR Q2'26 Earnings: revenue estimate is 116.09M USD
feed.summary: NN, Inc. (NNBR) is scheduled to announce its Q2'26 earnings on July 30, with revenue estimated at $116.09 million and EPS anticipated at $0.00. The provided data includes a detailed breakdown of reported and estimated revenue and EPS for several quarters, along with the surprise percentages.
